reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 좋아하는 강아지에게 딱이네요 ㅋㅋ 너무 귀엽고 좋아해요~~
reviews.content_en: Perfect for my pup who loves squeaky toys! ㅋㅋ So cute and he loves it~~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 오랜만에 새로운 장난감 사줬더니 신났네요. 삑삑이 소리가 꾀 커요. 우리집 첫째가 제일 좋아해요. 너무 귀여워❤️
reviews.content_en: Got him a new toy after a long time and he's so excited! The squeaky sound is pretty loud. My oldest loves it the most. So cute ❤️

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
가입하고 10,000원이상 첫구매시 100원에 구매할수 있다길래
저희 본가에 살고있는 막내동생 휴지가 장난감이라면
자다가도 방방 뛰는애라 사주면 좋아하겠다싶어
따뜻한 패딩하나랑 같이 미리 크리스마스 선물용으로
구매했는데 완전 푹빠졌네요ㅋㅋㅋ
한번 빨아서 줬는데 신나게 가지고 놀다가
낮잠잘때 결국 옆에 끼구 같이 자네요ㅎㅎ
실밥같은 하자는 한군데도 없었고
소형견이 한입에 물 수있는 아담한 크기여서
빨고나서 널어둬도 금방 말라요ㅎㅎ
저희 휴지가 잘 갖고 놀고 좋아하는것보니
조만간 또 장난감 사러올것같은 기분이 들기도 해요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
소형견 키우시는 분들은 꼭 사시라고 추천드리고 싶어요!
reviews.content_en: I saw that if you sign up and make your first purchase over 10,000 won, you can get it for 100 won, so I thought my youngest brother Hyuji at our family home would love it since he's a toy-obsessed pup who bounces around even in his sleep. I bought it early as a Christmas present along with some warm padding, and he's totally obsessed with it ㅋㅋㅋ I washed it once and gave it to him, and he played with it excitedly then ended up sleeping with it next to him during nap time ㅎㅎ There were no flaws like loose threads anywhere, and it's a perfect compact size that a small dog can fit in his mouth. Even after washing, it dries quickly when hung up ㅎㅎ Since Hyuji loves playing with it so much, I have a feeling I'll be coming back to buy more toys soon ㅋㅋㅋㅋ If you have a small dog, I definitely recommend you get this!

reviews.name: 위****
reviews.content:
6.2키로 ㅋ 입이 쏙 들어오는 삑삑이를 좋아해요
사이즈 약간 크지만 괜찮고 역시나 너무 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: 6.2kg ㅋ Love the squeaky toy that fits right in his mouth. The size is a bit big but it's fine, and he absolutely loves it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
삑삑이 소리 잘 나고 너무 귀여워요
저희집 애기가 뜯자마자 엄청 신나서 물고 다녀요 ㅋㅋㅋ
세일 때 저렴하게 사서 너무 좋습니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The squeaky sound works great and it's so cute! My pup got super excited as soon as I opened it and carried it around in his mouth ㅋㅋㅋ Got it on sale for cheap and I'm so happy ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
보자마자 눈이 휘둥그레해져서 마구 뺏으려하더라구요ㅋㅋ
어찌나 귀엽던지 
그래서 몇번 뺏었더니 안뺏기려고 턱에 괴고있네욬ㅋㅋㅋ
하루종일 마요인형 들여다보고 있어요!
유난히 이불속을 좋아하고 천으로된 인형을 좋아하는 아가라ㅎㅎ 마요네즈 인형 대 성 공 템이네요!
첫 구매 이벤트로 저렴하게 구매했는데
잘 쓸게요!
reviews.content_en: As soon as he saw it, his eyes went wide and he tried to snatch it away ㅋㅋ It's so adorable! After taking it away a few times, he won't let go and just holds it in his mouth ㅋㅋㅋ He's been staring at the mayo plush all day long! Since my pup especially loves blanket forts and fabric toys ㅎㅎ the mayo plush is a total hit! I got it cheap through the first purchase event and will use it well!

reviews.name: 화****
reviews.content: 오랜만에 장난감 사줬는데 너무 기여워요ㅠㅠ 일주일 넘게 짱친이예요 계속 물고 다님 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Got him a toy after a long time and it's so cute ㅠㅠ He's been obsessed with it for over a week, keeps carrying it around in his mouth ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 예전에 10분만에 삑삑이 없애고 케찹 속을 다 파낼 정도로 맘에 들어해서 이번에는 마요네즈로 구매해봤어요~!! 역시 이번에도 10분 안으로 삑삑이 소리 없애버리고 다른 장난감으로 목표물 변경해서 괴롭히네요ㅋㅋ 매번 장난감은 바잇미에서 사는데 만족합니당!!
reviews.content_en: Before, he destroyed the ketchup one and ripped out the squeaker in 10 minutes, so this time I tried the mayo version~!! Sure enough, he got rid of the squeaky sound in under 10 minutes again and moved on to harassing other toys ㅋㅋ I always buy toys from BITE ME and I'm satisfied!!

reviews.name: o****
reviews.content: 이제 이 개찹은 파괴왕 강아지에게 희생당할 예정입니다.. 원래 바잇미 인형만 쓰다가 잠깐 다른 브랜드로 갈아탔었는데 그 쪽 인형은 저희 강아지에게서 버티지 못해서..다시 바잇미로 왔습니다. 인형 너무 귀엽고 삑삑이 소리도 크고 크기도 적당하고~ 준지 2분 됐는데 안 찢어지는 거 보면 꽤 오래갈 예정인가봐요~
reviews.content_en: This ketchup toy will now be sacrificed to my destroyer dog.. I used to only use BITE ME plushies, but tried a different brand for a bit and it couldn't hold up to my dog, so I came back to BITE ME. The plushies are so cute, the squeaky sound is loud, the size is just right~ It's only been 2 minutes and it's not torn yet, so it looks like it's going to last quite a while~

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
토마토개찹에 이어 물지마요까지 구입했는데 둘 다 잘 갖고 놀기는 
하지만 이모가 사준 토마토개찹을 더 조아하네요^^
이제 요령이 생겨서인지 혼자서도 삑삑 소리내면서 잘 놀아요~~
하루종일 물고 다니는데도 잘 안 뜯어져서 장난감 금방 망가뜨리는 
아이라면 토마토개찹, 물지마요 추천드릴게요!!
reviews.content_en: I bought the tomato ketchup and the don't bite mayo, and he plays with both, but he likes the tomato ketchup that his aunt gave him better ^^ He's gotten the hang of it and now plays on his own, making squeaky sounds~~ Even though he carries it around in his mouth all day, it doesn't tear easily, so if your pup destroys toys quickly, I'd recommend the tomato ketchup or the don't bite mayo!!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 마요네즈 디자인도 색감도 너무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: The mayo design and colors are so cute! 🥰

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 케찹이랑 마요 둘 중에 고민하다가 마요 인형 색깔이 저희 강아지 옷 색깔이랑 비슷하길래 마요로 구매했어요 삑삑이 장난감이라 삑삑 눌러주면 애기가 넘 좋아해요 ! 그리고 박음질이 잘 되어있어서 쉽게 망가지지는 않을 것 같아요 바잇미 첫 구매인데 엄청 만족스러워요 !
reviews.content_en: I was torn between the ketchup and mayo, but I went with the mayo because the color matched my dog's outfit so well! It's a squeaky toy, so whenever I press it, my pup goes crazy for it! 😄 And the stitching is really solid, so it doesn't seem like it'll fall apart easily. This is my first BITE ME purchase and I'm seriously so satisfied!

reviews.content: 이것저것 다른장난감들 마니 사줬지만 결국 최애장난감은 바잇미인거같아요 물고 뜯고해도 튼튼해서 항상 구매한답니다 이번 장난감도 성공
reviews.content_en: I've bought my dog lots of different toys, but BITE ME seems to be their ultimate favorite toy! Even after chewing and biting it, it's so durable that I always repurchase. This toy is another success!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
평소에 인형 물고 있는 걸 좋아해서 그런지 
무민 같은 인형을 좋아하더라구요
요 제품 보자마자 좋아하겠다 싶어서 사줬더니
넘 좋아하네여
케첩도 살껄 그랬어요🥲
(버려진 프레첼..)
reviews.content_en:
My dog usually loves having plushies in their mouth, so I noticed they'd like something that looks like Moomin. When I saw this product, I knew they'd love it, so I got it for them and they absolutely adore it! I should've gotten the ketchup too 🥲
(RIP the abandoned pretzel..)

reviews.name: k****
reviews.content: 6개월 반 된, 3.4kg 강아지가 너무 좋아합니다. 완전 물고 빨고 터그놀이에, 공놀이까지 신났어요. 오자마자 케찹 빨고 건조해서 줬는데 한나절만에 하도 물고 빨아 너무 다 젖어서 하루만에 다시 빨고 이번엔 마요. 둘 다 좋아해요.
reviews.content_en: My 6.5-month-old pup who weighs 3.4kg loves it so much! They're having a blast chewing on it, sucking on it, playing tug-of-war, and playing fetch. When it arrived, I gave them the ketchup after sucking and drying it, but they chewed and sucked on it so much in just half a day that it got completely wet, so I had to dry and wash it again the next day. This time we're going with mayo. They love both!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 장난감들이 다 특성이 있고 개성넘쳐서 좋아요. 저희 강아지가 너무 좋아하고 잘 물어뜯고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: The toys all have their own unique characteristics and personality, which is great! My dog loves them and enjoys chewing and playing with them.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 삑삑이가 크고 튼튼해요 !!! 다음에는 세트로 구매하려고요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The squeaker is big and super durable!!! Next time I'm planning to buy a set! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 귀엽고 튼튼해요! 삑삑 소리랑 물어뜯는걸 좋아해서 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's cute and durable! My pup loves the squeaky sound and chewing, so they have so much fun playing with it! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지도 만족! 저도 덩달아만족!! 저희 보리가 제일좋아라하는 장난감이에요^^ 잘때도 안고자구 어디갈때도 꼭 챙겨가야해요  최고 애착인형이 되었답니당 그래서 저또한 만족도가 아주 높습니다^^  애기가 조아하니까요 !!
reviews.content_en: My dog is happy! And I'm happy too!! This is Bori's favorite toy ever ^^ They even want to hold it while sleeping and have to bring it everywhere we go. It's become their most beloved plushie! That's why I'm also super satisfied ^^ Because my baby loves it!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바잇미는 패키지까지 완벽해서 받을 때 마다 놀랍네요!
reviews.content_en: BITE ME is so perfect even down to the packaging - every time I receive an order, I'm amazed!

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 튼튼하고 애기가 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: Durable and my pup loves it!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 오뚜개 토마토개찹 짱입니다~! 우프바이베xx에서 오뚜개 물지마요&토마토개찹 을 알고, 거기서 먼저 구매를 했었는데요, 바잇미에서 우리 강아지 휴대용 간식통을 구매할겸해서 봤다가 제 주변 강아지한테 선물해주려고 하나 더 구입했어요! 소리도 다른 삑삑이장난감에 비해서 크고,맑아요!. 우리 다복이(강아지)는 2.8~3kg의 말티즈인데요, 충분히 잘 물고 다녀요! 물고다니는 모습이 얼마나 귀여운지ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ 케찹이랑 마요네즈가 뭔지나 알고 좋아하는건지ㅠㅠㅠㅎㅎㅎ♡ 잘쓰겠습니다~
reviews.content_en: OTTOGI tomato ketchup is the best~! I found out about OTTOGI Don't Bite Me & Tomato Ketchup at another pet site and bought it there first, but when I was looking at BITE ME to buy a portable treat container for our dog, I ended up getting another one to give as a gift to a friend's dog! The sound is louder and clearer compared to other squeaky toys. Our Daboki (our dog) is a 2.8-3kg Maltese and she carries it around really well! The way she carries it in her mouth is so adorable ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ I wonder if she actually knows what ketchup and mayonnaise are or if she just likes them ㅠㅠㅠㅎㅎㅎ♡ We'll use it well~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 개찹과 물지마요 중 고르라니까 마요네즈가 맘에 드나봐요! 물지마요만 물고다녀요!
reviews.content_en: I had to choose between ketchup and Don't Bite Me, so mayonnaise must be her favorite! She only carries around the Don't Bite Me one!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 선물로 인기 최고… 저는 갱얼쥐가 없지만 사랑하는 사람으로 친구 집에 각각 하나씩 사들고 갔답니다… 인기 폭발… 신나서 던져주고 물고 당기고… 친구도 실패할 각오하라고 했는데 반응 너무 좋아서 의외였다고 하네요:) 서비스로 넣어준 간식도 고마워용♥
reviews.content_en: The ultimate gift… I don't have a dog myself but I brought one each to my friends' houses because I love them so much… They're a huge hit… The dogs are so excited throwing them, biting them, and pulling on them… My friend said she expected them to fail but was pleasantly surprised by how well the dogs reacted :) Thank you for also including treats as a bonus gift♥

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 케찹 너무 귀여워서 주문했어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 잘놀아요 덕분에 ^^
reviews.content_en: I ordered the ketchup because it's so cute ㅋㅋㅋㅋ It plays with it great thanks to you ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 삑삑거리면서 물고 던지고 아주 좋아하네요. 상표 와펜은 하루만에 반쯤 뜯어버려서 떼어내고 봉합수술했어요. 더 사다 쟁여둘 생각입니다.
reviews.content_en: It squeaks and my dog loves biting and throwing it around. The brand label came off after just one day and got ripped in half, so I removed it and stitched it up. I'm thinking of buying more and stocking up.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 진짜 너무 좋아해요! 삑삑 소리가 나는 장난감이 많은데 그 중에서 이 케찹 친구를 제일 좋아해요!! 앙 물고 뛰어다니고 누워서 물고 장난아닙니다ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 받을때 패키지도 너무 귀여워서 200%만족입니다! 감사합니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I really love it so much! There are lots of squeaky toys but this ketchup buddy is definitely her favorite!! She bites it and runs around, lies down and plays with it, it's serious ㅋㅋㅋㅋ I'm 200% satisfied because even the package was so cute when I received it! Thank you ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 엄청좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ맨날갖고와여ㅋㅋㅋ잘때도 갖고오고 너무귀여워여 ㅎㅎㅎ 처음구매햇는데 장난감은이제바잇미에서만구매해야갯어여 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: She loves it so much ㅋㅋㅋㅋ She brings it every day ㅋㅋㅋ even brings it to bed and it's so cute ㅎㅎㅎ This was my first purchase and now I can only buy toys from BITE ME ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 마요네즈 이름에 알맞게 마요네즈 장난감을 선물하기 위해 5개 구매하였어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 마요가 마요물고있는게 너무사랑스럽고 귀엽네용
reviews.content_en: I bought 5 of the mayonnaise toys as a gift that matches the name ㅋㅋㅋ The way Mayo carries the mayonnaise toy around is so lovable and cute!

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
저희 댕댕이 이름이 마요인데 마요네즈 장난감이있길래 샀어요~
저희 마요도 엄청 잘 가지고 놀고 귀여워요
배송도 빨라요!
reviews.content_en: My doggy's name is Mayo so when I saw there was a mayonnaise toy, I had to get it~ My Mayo absolutely loves playing with it and it's so cute. Shipping was fast too!

reviews.name: 마****
reviews.content: 애기가 진짜 좋아해요 ㅠㅠ  같이 상 프레시미 스프레이 뿌려서 주니까 안심되고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My baby absolutely loves it ㅠㅠ I feel so relieved spraying FRESH ME spray on it together before giving it to her, and it's great!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 이미 한참 가지고 놀아서 때가 좀 탔네요~! 솔직히 디자인이 제가 맘에 들어서 구입했ㅋㅋㅋ 포장 디자인도 정말 귀여워서 버리지 않고 보관중이에요ㅋㅋㅋ 장난감보다는 사람 무는 걸 더 좋아해서 자주 가지고 놀지는 않지만, 저를 못 물어서(;) 지 성에 안찰때 가지고 노니 그나마 다행...ㅠㅠ 앞으로도 귀여운 디자인의 장난감 많이 나오면 좋겠습니다^0^
reviews.content_en: It's already gotten a bit dirty from playing with it so much~! Honestly, I bought it because I loved the design ㅋㅋㅋ The packaging design is so cute that I'm keeping it instead of throwing it away ㅋㅋㅋ Since she likes biting people more than toys, she doesn't play with it that often, but since she can't bite me (;) at least she plays with it when she's not satisfied ㅠㅠ I hope you keep releasing cute designed toys in the future^0^

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content:
우유가 너무 좋아해요♡
누워서 얼마나 재밌게 놀던지
진작에 사줄걸 터그지옥 열림
reviews.content_en:
Milk loves it so much ♡
She has so much fun playing with it while lying down
I should've bought it sooner... tug toy paradise unlocked 😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 입에 물기 좋은사이즈에요 하루만에 구멍이났어요 ㅠㅠ 물고 뜯는거 좋아하는애라ㅠㅠ두개살걸  너무귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's a great size to bite on, but it got a hole in just one day ㅠㅠ She loves to bite and chew stuff ㅠㅠ Should've bought two! It's adorable though

reviews.name: p****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여운 삑삑이 인형이에요
우유가 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 뿌듯
reviews.content_en:
It's such a cute squeaky toy!
I'm so proud that Milk plays with it so well

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 근데 삑삑이가 많이 뻑뻑해요 뭐 귀여운 맛에 사용해요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute, but the squeaker gets stuck a lot ㅠㅠ Well, I keep using it for the adorableness factor lol

reviews.name: 먼****
reviews.content: 패키지부터 심쿵. 물지마요~ 너무 귀엽고  아이도 좋아해요^^
reviews.content_en: The packaging alone made my heart skip 💕 Don't bite~! It's so cute and my pup loves it too^^

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 최고???? 품절대란속 사재기 성공???? 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 친구들 선물하려구요
reviews.content_en: Best???? Successfully panic-bought during the shortage shortage???? She plays with it so well that I'm thinking of getting it as gifts for my friends

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 엄청 푹신푹신해서 강아지가 너무 좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋ자꾸 자기거라고 집에 가지고 들어갑니당
reviews.content_en: It's so incredibly soft and fluffy that my dog loves it so much ㅋㅋㅋ She keeps trying to sneak it into the house like it's hers

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 바잇미 장난감을 세상에서 제일 좋아하는 도담이,, 마요네즈도 엄청 좋아하네욯ㅎㅎ 저번에 펫페어에서 산 쿠키는 1시간만에 찢어버려서 너무 속상했는데 마요네즈는 오래 가지고 놀아주면 좋겠어요,,
reviews.content_en: Dodami, who loves BITE ME toys the most in the world... also loves Mayonnaise so much ㅎㅎ Last time I got the Cookie at the pet fair and she tore it up in an hour so I was really upset, but I hope she plays with Mayonnaise for a long time...

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
던지고 놀기 딱 좋은 사이즈!
큰 삑삑이가 들어있어서 소리가 아주 잘나요🎵
reviews.content_en: Perfect size for throwing and playing! 🎵 It has a big squeaker inside so it makes a great sound!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 최애장난감이 되었어용 뜯어주자마자 삐꾸삐꾸 삐욕삐욕 쉴때도 입에 물고 쉬고 잘때도 꼭 옆에 두고 자용 특히나 새콤한 오뚜개 케챱을 좀더 좋아하는거 같네용ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's become my pup's favorite toy! The second I took it out of the package, it was squeaking and squealing non-stop 😄 Even when resting, my dog keeps it in their mouth, and sleeps with it right by their side. Especially seems to love the tangy ketchup one lol

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 마요랑개찹이랑 두개다 구입했어요!  마요먼저 공개했는데 댕댕이가 너모좋아해요 :)  인형중에 물면 털이 빠져서 캑캑하게 되는것도 많은데 요장난감은 보들보들하면서 털빠짐은 없어서 넘좋은것같아요(최고!)  조만간 개찹도 공개해주려고요 ㅎㅎ 이제 장난감은 바잇미로 정착해야겠어요 정말 바잇미가 가능한 좋은제품 감사해요•_•
reviews.content_en: I bought both the mayo and ketchup versions! We introduced the mayo first and my pup absolutely loves it :) A lot of plush toys shed when bitten, but this one is so soft and doesn't shed at all, which is amazing! (Best!) I'm planning to introduce the ketchup one soon haha From now on, BITE ME toys are the way to go. Really, thank you for making such great products 💕

reviews.name: 멍****
reviews.content: 한입에촥 너무귀여워용
reviews.content_en: Fits perfectly in one bite! So cute!

reviews.name: t****
reviews.content: 좋아하네요 강아지가
reviews.content_en: My dog really likes it

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 무미의 애착인형... 개찹.. 옆구리를 뜯어먹어서... 꼬맸어여ㅠㅜ 건드리면 화내면서 지가 물어 뜯음 흑흑이...ㅠ.ㅠ 아련한 개찹표정과 찰떡이에염...
reviews.content_en: Mumy's favorite plush... the ketchup one... had its side chewed up... now it's damaged ㅠ When I touch it, he gets mad and chews it himself 😭 He's such a cutie though with that sad ketchup expression...

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 개챱 없어지면 큰일납니다... ㅋㅋㅋ 똑같은거 몇십개째인거같은데 너무 좋아해요 강아지가!
reviews.content_en: If the ketchup one goes missing, it's a disaster... lol I've probably bought dozens of the same ones because my pup loves it so much!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 한마리 입양, 나머지 두형제 임보 중에 있습니다. 바잇미 장난감 중에 핫 아이템들만 골라 사줬는데, 역시나 잘 노네요. 색도 이쁘고 삑삑이도 잘되요.
reviews.content_en: I've adopted one and am fostering two siblings. I picked out the hot items from BITE ME toys and they're playing with them great! The colors are pretty and the squeakers work perfectly too.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 두번째로 사주는ㅋㅋㅋ마요랑 개찹삑삑이인형ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ역시나 잘가지고놀아요
reviews.content_en: Buying it for the second time lol The mayo and ketchup squeaky plushies are a hit again!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 울지말아요 예전에 구입했었는데 금방 물고 뜯고 놀아서 다시 구매해봤습니다 요즘 최애탬이구여 고양이도 관심으로 보이네요.. 흠.ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Please don't cry! I bought one before and my pup chewed and tore it apart quickly, so I repurchased it. It's my pup's current favorite toy! Even my cat seems interested in it... hmm lol
